title: agent-core: loop strategy gaps -- concurrent, group-chat, handoff
issueBody:
## Summary
Agent loop strategies have several weaknesses:

- Concurrent: Promise.allSettled with no per-agent timeout, no partial results
- Group-chat: moderator selection is naive string matching, no validation
- Handoff: no context transfer between agents, no validation of handoff target
- No loop cancellation token (can't cancel from outside)
- Oversight is single-pass (maxRetries=0 hardcoded)
- Delegation timeout accepted but never enforced
- Strategies are isolated (can't mix/compose)

Ref: `docs/agent-layer-gaps.md`

issueComments.author: tmuskal
issueComments.body:
**Related:** #579 (concurrent effects -- loop strategies should leverage parallel dispatch)
**Related:** #581 (subagent effect -- handoff strategy should use external agents)

issueComments.author: a5c-ai
issueComments.body: Triage summary confirms issue #589 is an architectural enhancement/hardening issue for @a5c-ai/agent-core. Evidence cited: concurrent runner uses Promise.allSettled without per-agent timeout or partial-result surface; group-chat moderator uses String(output).includes(id); handoff changes currentAgentId without structured context transfer; SubagentInvoker hardcodes runner.review(output, 0); timeoutMs exists but is not enforced. Recommended approach: add failing behavioral tests first, then implement per-agent timeout/partial results, structured moderator selection, structured handoff context and target validation, external cancellation, configurable oversight retry, enforced delegation timeout, and compatibility-preserving typed options.

issueComments.author: a5c-ai
issueComments.body: Historical context: a prior plan PR was opened at https://github.com/a5c-ai/babysitter/pull/692 and summarized phases for runtime issue reading, reuse audit, runtime call path tracing, failing Vitest tests, implementation, verification, and semantic review. Treat as context only; this process should be executable independently and should not include implementation source changes.

issueComments.author: tmuskal
issueComments.body: Plan dispatched and implementation pipeline active. Closing as work is tracked via PRs.

relatedIssues.summary: Concurrent effects; loop strategies should leverage parallel dispatch.
Subagent effect; handoff strategy should use external agents.
Initial L4 Agent-Core strategy and subagent surfaces.

implementationSlices.title: Add typed loop contracts and external cancellation
scope: Extend PromptFn and AgentLoop run/iterate options with cancellation semantics.
Propagate AbortSignal through strategy dispatch where possible.
Define cancelled/error state behavior and timer cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt functions can observe the cancellation signal.
Tests cover state transitions and cleanup.

implementationSlices.title: Harden concurrent strategy timeout and partial-result semantics
scope: Add per-agent timeout semantics while preserving maxParallelism batching.
Return deterministic partial results for fulfilled, rejected, timed-out, and cancelled agents.
Avoid hanging the whole batch on one unresolved prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: One slow agent records a timeout result without losing faster agent outputs.
Timeout errors are structured enough for callers to distinguish from normal rejections.

implementationSlices.title: Replace fragile moderator matching with validated structured speaker selection
scope: Prefer structured moderator output for next speaker selection.
Validate selected agents against configured agent IDs.
Handle ambiguous or invalid moderator output with clear behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Unknown speaker selections fail or fall back exactly as documented.
Ambiguous string output no longer silently selects the first substring match.
Existing round-robin behavior still works without a moderator.

implementationSlices.title: Add handoff target validation and context transfer
scope: Validate entry and handoff targets against configured agent IDs.
Define and implement structured handoff context transfer.
Preserve termination behavior when no handoff is requested.
acceptanceCriteria: Unknown handoff target is rejected clearly.
Next agent receives transferred context deterministically.
Handoff count and termination semantics remain bounded.

implementationSlices.title: Enforce delegation timeout and configurable oversight retries
scope: Clarify whether retries re-review existing output or reinvoke the subagent with feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Delegation timeout returns a failed SubagentResult.
Oversight retries are configurable and tested.
Side-effect/idempotency risks are documented where reinvocation is allowed.

implementationSlices.title: Address strategy composition, public exports, and documentation
scope: Implement a minimal tested strategy composition contract or document a precise adapter boundary.
Update public exports for any new public types.
Update README/docs and docs/agent-layer-gaps.md once behavior is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Composition gap has a tested implementation or explicit documented non-goal.
Docs no longer claim completed gaps are missing.

qualityCommands: npm exec --yes --package=vitest -- vitest run --config vitest.config.ts packages/agent-core/src/loop/__tests__/agent-loop.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/subagent/__tests__/invoker.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/session.test.ts
nonGoals: Do not implement unrelated agent-layer gaps from docs/agent-layer-gaps.md.
Do not replace AgentLoop or SubagentInvoker wholesale.
Do not change unrelated SDK or agent-platform behavior unless necessary for public capability metadata.
